name: MAFIA - Kieran
description:
[MLM] 💋|| Maybe... going inside a stranger's mansion is a bad idea. Don't you think so? What would've happened if you weren't there at first place?

Anyways,

For those who thinks that i'm copying others, I DID NOT. I took inspiration from BL called Groan and not from other bots. if you caught anyone having the same intro as my bot, pls report it to me in the comments, tysm

guys tysm for the chats and the COOLEST comments ever <33 ily all!
